faqs.question: How can I get into Institute of Environment and Management for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Institute of Environment and Management has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
BBA Candidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from any recognised board are eligible to apply.
BCA Candidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from any recognised board are eligible to apply.
M.A. Candidates must have completed Bachelor's Degree from recognised institute/university are eligible to apply.
PG Diploma The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.
B.Pharma Candidates must have passed 10+2 in Science stream from recognised board are eligible to apply.
D.Pharma The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.
MCA Candidate must have passed Mathematics at 10+2 level or Graduation level. Candidates with grace marks are not allowed for admission. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
MBA/PGDM Candidates must have Bachelor's Degree from recognised institute/university are eligible to apply.

Institute of Environment and Management is an institute, established in 1991 in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. Institute of Environment and Management is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 10 courses at UG and PG levels in 1 specialisation such as Sales & Marketing. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM, MCA, BCA, B.Pharma and BBA in Full Time mode. Institute of Environment and Management fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 22,000 to 2,82,000. Institute of Environment and Management has an annual seat intake of 870 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Hospitality & Travel. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

At the UG and PG levels, Institute of Environment and Management offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers BCA, B.Pharma and BBA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM, MCA and PG Diploma. The Institute of Environment and Management course fee ranges between INR 22,000 to 2,82,000.

placements.overview:
Hindustan Institute of Technology and Management, Ambala is a private institute, established in 2008 in Ambala, Haryana. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Management, Ambala is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 10 courses at UG and After 10th levels in 6 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology and Mechanical Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma in Full Time mode. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Management, Ambala fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 56,100 to 1,95,000. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Management, Ambala has an annual seat intake of 540 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering and Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Management, Ambala offers diverse programmes at UG and After 10th levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at After 10th level, Hindustan Institute of Technology and Management, Ambala offers courses such as After 10th Diploma. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Management, Ambala fee structure for all the courses is around INR 56,100 to 1,95,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a great infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Students perform very well in exams and also get qualified for the high-level exams. Sadly, there are no placements in our college. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have a very high-quality infrastructure with all kinds of facilities. Quality of labs and classrooms is very good. reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college. Time, career, and money wastage, etc. There are no placements.

review_content.Placements: The college had very poor placement in the field of ME, CE, EE, EC, and MBA. Around 25% of the students are placed, and there are no internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and excellent with all modern amenities like Wi-Fi, hostels, labs, games, medical, buses, lift projector classes, seminar halls, etc. The medium quality food served at the hostel. I did not face any issue with the infrastructure. The college has a good appearance of building with modern design and hostels are also having proper space with many toilets and bathroom. The college has big natural space for garden and playground. The college has a canteen.
